globals.name: cultivating_change_talk
globals.justification: The assistant consistently invited the user to explore their own motivations and desires, such as asking what would happen if they weren't able to achieve a flawless image, and what it would mean to feel good enough, which helped to draw out the user's own arguments for change.

globals.name: softening_sustain_talk
globals.justification: The assistant skillfully reflected the user's resistance and sustain talk without arguing against it, such as when the user expressed fear of not meeting expectations, the assistant acknowledged and explored this fear instead of pushing back or lecturing.

globals.name: partnership
globals.justification: The assistant actively fostered an equal partnership with the user, inviting their expertise and insights, and allowing the user to set the pace and direction of the conversation, such as when the assistant asked the user to share more about what would help them feel grounded and less alone.

globals.name: empathy
globals.justification: The assistant demonstrated a deep, nuanced understanding of the user's perspective and inner world, such as when the assistant reflected the user's fear of not being good enough and the pressure to be perfect, and helped the user to articulate their own feelings and needs.
